rationale.R1.3: Artifact makes specific quantitative claims (4.1 GWh, 3.7 GWh, $0.42/day, 2%/year degradation) tied to simulation outputs; a cleanup pass should flag whether these numbers are adequately grounded or presented with sufficient caveats.

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean writing polish only (sentence-level prose, flow, redundancy), or should it also include scrutinizing and moderating the novelty/priority claims ('first', 'fundamental departure', 'natural successor')?
